title: Q3 saw deficit increase in current account by 86% yoy
body: Current account deficit was reported at USD 2.15 billion in Q3 2024, increasing 86% year-on-year (yoy) from USD 1.15 billion.

title: Profit slowed down, LPCK’s shareholders agreed upon rights issue of 3 billion share
body: Shareholders of PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK) has approved the plan of rights issue of 3 billion shares, despite its profit slowing down in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Speeding up factory construction, SUNI secures over IDR 100 billion loan from UOB
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI) and its subsidiary, PT Rainbow Tubulars Manufacture (RTM), has signed a credit agreement with PT Bank UOB Indonesia.

title: Holding BI-rate down, Rupiah slips near IDR 16,000 today
body: Following the decision by Bank Indonesia's Board of Governors to maintain the BI rate at 6.00% yesterday (20/11), the Rupiah has slumped against the US Dollar, dropping to Rp15,945 as of 10.30 AM WIB today (21/11).

title: DEPO eyes IDR 3 trillion revenue in 2025
body: PT Caturkarda Depo Bangunan Tbk (DEPO) is targeting revenue of IDR 3 trillion in 2025, considering the newly established political stability following new government cabinet formation.

title: Q3 saw deficit increase in current account by 86% yoy
body: Current account deficit was reported at USD 2.15 billion in Q3 2024, increasing 86% year-on-year (yoy) from USD 1.15 billion.

title: Profit slowed down, LPCK’s shareholders agreed upon rights issue of 3 billion share
body: Shareholders of PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK) has approved the plan of rights issue of 3 billion shares, despite its profit slowing down in the first half (H1) of 2024.

title: Speeding up factory construction, SUNI secures over IDR 100 billion loan from UOB
body: PT Sunindo Pratama Tbk (SUNI) and its subsidiary, PT Rainbow Tubulars Manufacture (RTM), has signed a credit agreement with PT Bank UOB Indonesia.

title: Holding BI-rate down, Rupiah slips near IDR 16,000 today
body: Following the decision by Bank Indonesia's Board of Governors to maintain the BI rate at 6.00% yesterday (20/11), the Rupiah has slumped against the US Dollar, dropping to Rp15,945 as of 10.30 AM WIB today (21/11).

title: DEPO eyes IDR 3 trillion revenue in 2025
body: PT Caturkarda Depo Bangunan Tbk (DEPO) is targeting revenue of IDR 3 trillion in 2025, considering the newly established political stability following new government cabinet formation.

title: Issuing bond, HRTA to revise proceeds target
body: PT Hartadinata Abadi Tbk (HRTA) is offering Shelf-Registration Bond II Phase I Year 2024 worth IDR 900 billion starting from Wednesday (20/11) to Thursday (21/11).

title: Adaro Andalan plans to use IPO proceeds for investment and loan repayment
body: PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia Tbk (AADI), a subsidiary of PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) that will make its debut on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX), reveals plans of IPO proceeds’ utilisation.

title: SBMA to expand gas-filling stations to Sulawesi
body: PT Surya Biru Murni Acetylene Tbk (SBMA) will expand its market reach by building gas-filling stations in Sulawesi in 2025. Until this year, SBMA manage 6 filling stations in 6 cities in Kalimantan.

title: Transcoal Pacific sets up IDR 700 Billion capex, eyeing over IDR 2 trillion revenue next year
body: PT Transcoal Pacific Tbk (TCPI) has set aside IDR 700 billion in capital expenditure (CapEx) for 2025 to expand its fleet of vessels.

title: Bids entered in state sukuk auction reached IDR 13.85 trillion
body: The number of bids entered in the auction of Government Sharia Securities (SBSN) or government sukuk on Monday (19/11) was recorded at IDR 13.85 trillion.

title: Spending USD 239 million, INDY to secure returns from gold mine in 2026
body: PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) is still grappling with challenges in its non-coal business diversification as of the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: Avia Avian pockets dividend income IDR 99.99 billion from subsidiary
body: PT Avia Avian Tbk (AVIA), a paint manufacturer listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (BEI) since 2021, has received interim cash dividend income from one of its subsidiaries, namely PT Tirtakencana Tatawarna (Tirta).

title: ADRO distributes cash dividends of US$2.62 billion
body: PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO) has allocated a final cash dividend of US$2.62 billion from the 2023 financial year, which will be paid to shareholders on (6/12).

title: Foreign buy reaches 5 billion shares, net foreign volume closed at 769 million shares
body: On Tuesday, November 19, foreign investors bought a total of 5.58 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign sell volume was 4.81 billion shares, with net foreign closing at 769.07 million shares. On the top buy list, the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) got the most purchases, totaling 3.36 billion shares with a net volume of 871.45 million shares.

title: Pelita Sukses Sejati acquired 6.25% of Sumber Tani Agung (STAA) stock
body: On Monday, November 18, PT Pelita Sukses Sejati purchased 6.25% of the shares in PT Sumber Tani Agung Resources Tbk (STAA), a palm oil company. Nearly 682 million shares of STAA were acquired by this new investor via PT Panin Sekuritas Tbk.

title: After coal mine divestment, Indika Energy won't likely to reach 2024 target
body: PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) admits that its performance at the end of 2024 will not be as brilliant as last year, especially after the divestment of its coal mine, PT Multi Tambang Jaya Utama (MUTU), which was completed last February.

title: PNGO posted interim dividend IDR 31.25 billion, down 42.85%
body: PT Pinago Utama Tbk (PNGO)'s interim dividend fell 42.85% to IDR 31.25 billion in the 2024 fiscal year from last year's interim dividend of IDR 54.68 billion.

title: DEPO will add 3 more outlets
body: PT Caturkarda Depo Bangunan Tbk (DEPO), a distributor of equipment and building materials, will open three new outlets in Palembang, Pekanbaru and Samarinda.

title: RAAM to open Platinum Cineplex theatre in Sragen
body: PT Tripar Multivision Plus Tbk (RAAM), also known as MVP, opened Platinum Cineplex theatre in Sragen, Central Java, on November 14, 2024.

title: Akulaku Group to divest shares in Bank Neo Commerce
body: Akulaku Group, the major shareholder of PT Bank Neo Commerce Tbk (BBYB) is planning gradual divestment of its shares to 30% of BBYB’s issued and paid-up capital.

title: FILM to provide guarantee for subsidiaries’ loans
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) has provided guarantee in the form of deposit for loan facilities received by its subsidiaries.

title: TOBA to restructure its subsidiaries
body: Shareholders of PT TBS Energi Utama Tbk (TOBA) agreed upon the plan to restructure its subsidiaries, PT Toba Bara Energi (TBE), PT Gorontalo Listrik Perdana (GLP), dan PT Minahasa Cahaya Lestari (MCL).

title: Sugiman Halim joins two issuers as new investor
body: Sugiman Halim, an independent investor, made the decision to simultaneously invest in two issuers on Friday, November 15. He now owns 6.09% of the shares in PT Newport Marine Services Tbk (BOAT), a business that rents out offshore vessels. Around 213.39 million BOAT shares were purportedly purchased via PT BRI Danareksa Sekuritas. Additionally, through PT Mandiri Sekuritas, Sugiman purchased nearly 170 million shares of PT Global Sukses Digital Tbk (DOSS), a retailer of photography and videography equipment. Officially, he now owns 9.85% of DOSS's shares.

title: Pinago Utama scored investment credit of IDR 170 billion from Bank Mandiri
body: PT Pinago Utama Tbk (PNGO), a company in the integrated palm and rubber plantation industry, signed investment credit facility agreement worth IDR 170 billion from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Entering green zone, net foreign volume surplus at 571.83 million shares
body: On Monday, November 18, net foreign volume entered the green zone, closing at 571.83 million shares. This was because the foreign buy volume was 4.53 billion shares, while the foreign sell volume was just 3.95 billion shares. The most shares purchased belonged to the digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO), which were bought up to 2.34 billion shares with a net volume of 550.58 million shares.

title: Less then a year, Atlantis Subsea saw 102% profit surge
body: PT Atlantis Subsea Indonesia Tbk (ATLA), an oil and gas company debuted on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) in April 2024, booked net profit of IDR 3.79 billion.

title: Next month, SMI to offer bond of IDR 2.7 trillion
body: PT Sarana Multi Infrastruktur (Persero) will offer Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase II Year 2024 worth IDR 2.7 trillion in early December 2024.

title: Bakrie Telecom's losses reached IDR 54.49 billion
body: PT Bakrie Telecom Tbk (BTEL), a telecommunications issuer belonging to the Bakrie Group, posted a loss of IDR 54.49 billion in the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: MCOL interim dividend this year fell 56%
body: PT Prima Andalan Prima Tbk (MCOL)'s interim dividend in the 2024 financial year was down by 56% from 2023. This year's interim dividend is also lower than in 2022, amounting to IDR 350 or IDR 1.24 trillion.

title: Morning session caught JCI climbing
body: At Tuesday’s (19/11) morning session, Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) demonstrated an optimistic trend.

title: Adaro Energy’s subsidiary eyes IDR 4.59 trillion in IPO
body: PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia (AADI), a coal mining company under PT Adaro Energy Indonesia Tbk (ADRO), will initiate its public offering (IPO) in Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: KIJA to revise marketing sales target this year
body: PT Kawasan Industri Jababeka Tbk (KIJA) is optimistic about attaining marketing sales of IDR 3 trillion this year, up from IDR 2.5 trillion set previously.

title: MBMA to channel USD 200 million financing facility to subsidiary
body: PT Merdeka Battery Materials Tbk (MBMA) has signed a financing facility with PT Merdeka Tsingshan Indonesia (MTI) worth up to USD 200 million.

title: ADHI saw 194% profit surge
body: Although the revenue slipped 19.97% year-on-year (yoy), PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) reported profit soaring 194.51% yoy in Q3 2024 to IDR 69.32 billion from IDR 23.53 billion in the same period last year.

title: Robby Adijaya joins Ginting Jaya Energi (WOWS) as new 5% shareholder
body: Robby Adijaya, an investor, acquired shares in PT Ginting Jaya Energi Tbk (WOWS) on Thursday, November 14. With a 5.11% stake, this individual investor purchased 126.56 million shares through PT Trimegah Sekuritas Indonesia Tbk and four additional securities firms. WOWS is an oil and gas contractor with a focus on procurement and rig services.
